calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Harrington for Bonnie Jo Russo (Pettioner/Administrator).

Ms. Harrington addressed the issue of the format of the creditor's claim. She explained in detail to the Court the format in which her client presented her claim. The Court took the matter under submission and informed Ms. Harrington that her client's fees would be reduced; she would not be paid at at the professional administrator rate.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/Sajja Ravinantapricha. Probate Examiner: C. Nahnsen. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
